method: Coarse scan at 1 frame per 15s, plus targeted 1f/5s and 1f/3s probes around suspected animation moments. Recorded ranges below are conservative wall-clock windows around each visible animation event. Frames outside these ranges are plain talking-head with the standard burned-in word-by-word caption (omitted from this catalog because it is a baseline, not an animation event).

XGm2ERU9qtA.title: 15 Brutal Truths I Know at 36 That I Wish I Knew at 20

ranges.label: tweet-card #2 enters (left side), text type-on reveal, item-number badge top-right
tweet-card #3 enters below #2 (vertical stack), both visible
tweet-card #5 (under-30 work hours quote)
tweet-card #7+#8 stacked (hardest part is continuing)
tweet-card #9 enters above (most dangerous person quote)

JDR-R--4HhM.title: 14 Years of Marketing Advice in 35 Minutes

ranges.label: whiteboard hard-cutaway: handwritten numbered list 1-4 (HEADLINES COME 1ST / SAY WHAT ONLY YOU CAN SAY / etc.)

JDR-R--4HhM.notes: JDR-R--4HhM is mostly raw talking head + paper props on desk + occasional whiteboard hard-cutaway. Almost no overlay graphics in the coarse sample.

qsXxckCbci0.title: How To Grow ANY Business FASTER (Masterclass)
qsXxckCbci0.notes: Despite being 80 minutes, this masterclass is almost entirely two camera angles (front and overhead) with physical paper / sharpies. NO tweet cards, NO numbered listicle overlays in any of the ~318 coarse-sampled frames. The animations are physical: paper props with hand-drawn lines and graphs. The closest 'animation' is the angle-switch hard cut between front camera and overhead camera, which is itself unanimated. Excluded from dense extraction.

_KlZoPxbStk.title: It took me 36 years to realize what I'll tell you in 26 minutes

ranges.label: intro tweet-card right-side (type-on reveal 'It's not about doing what you...')
full-screen 'GODMODE' graphic: stick-figure icon centered, yellow underline label, dark navy bg, white glow
side-text reveal: multi-line text-block on right with red highlight on key words, type-on reveal
tweet-card right-side with PROGRESSIVE word-dimming reveal ('There is nothing' — 'nothing' grayed out mid-reveal)

3SVksBB3_YY.title: Give me 20 Minutes and I'll Give You Back 20 Years of Your Life

ranges.label: opening b-roll of building exterior + name-tag lower-third 'ALEX HORMOZI / FOUNDER, ACQUISITION.COM'
top-down whiteboard hard-cutaway with handwritten word 'GROCERIES' being written live (live-marker effect)
burned-in math formula caption '$1000/mo = Extra 23 HOURS/wk' over front-camera shot
tall left-aligned caption stack with multi-color emphasized words ('IT INCREASES THE PRODUCTIVITY PER HOUR')
cartoon illustration overlay: orange-and-grey boot/sock graphic on left of frame (top-left corner)
numbered carousel badges across bottom-third: '01' ... '06' ... circular green/grey badges + active item pill 'DRIVER/UBER'
lower-third category caption 'LANDSCAPING / TIME SAVED' yellow-on-white split pill
full-screen purple-bg pyramid hierarchy graphic with three tiers (Economy / Transportation / Energy)

nSQdjim8CsE.title: Making Money is a Game (Here's the Cheat Code)

ranges.label: top-down whiteboard hard-cutaway with handwritten green-marker LBO math (21/$21, 100=$2000, etc.)
top-down whiteboard hard-cutaway with multi-color marker breakdown ($53 highlighted in green box, leads=100, sales=15, etc.)

nSQdjim8CsE.notes: nSQdjim8CsE is also mostly raw talking head + book prop + occasional overhead-camera whiteboard hard-cutaway. No tweet cards in the coarse sample.
